case ofFinsupp.mk
R : Type u
a b : R
m n✝ : ℕ
inst✝¹ : Semiring R
p q : R[X]
S : Type u_1
inst✝ : AddCommMonoid S
f : ℕ → R → S
hf : ∀ (i : ℕ), f i 0 = 0
s n : Finset ℕ
hn : ℕ → R
mem_support_toFun✝ : ∀ (a : ℕ), a ∈ n ↔ hn a ≠ 0
hs : { toFinsupp := { support := n, toFun := hn, mem_support_toFun := mem_support_toFun✝ } }.support ⊆ s
⊢ { toFinsupp := { support := n, toFun := hn, mem_support_toFun := mem_support_toFun✝ } }.sum f =
    ∑ n_1 ∈ s, f n_1 ({ toFinsupp := { support := n, toFun := hn, mem_support_toFun := mem_support_toFun✝ } }.coeff n_1)

case ofFinsupp.mk
R : Type u
a b : R
m n : ℕ

p q : R[X]
S : Type u_1
inst✝ : AddCommMonoid S
f : ℕ → R → S
hf : ∀ (i : ℕ), f i 0 = 0
s i : Finset ℕ
hi : ℕ → R
mem_support_toFun✝ : ∀ (a : ℕ), a ∈ i ↔ hi a ≠ 0
hs : { toFinsupp := { support := i, toFun := hi, mem_support_toFun := mem_support_toFun✝ } }.support ⊆ s
⊢ { toFinsupp := { support := i, toFun := hi, mem_support_toFun := mem_support_toFun✝ } }.sum f =
    ∑ n ∈ s, f n ({ toFinsupp := { support := i, toFun := hi, mem_support_toFun := mem_support_toFun✝ } }.coeff n)
